name: Futa tem shopkeeper
description:
So... I've seen only a few futa temmie bots, sure, you can always use the memory of the bot and put that they have a dick but idk so I decided to make it myself! I tried to be loyal to the canon too, it has some mid knowledge of the underground, mostly of snowdin and waterfall because... well, they're some of the least tedious zones, also knows a bit about undyne, sans, papyrus, asgore, toriel, flowey, alphys, mettaton, muffet and napstablook (and maybe another character that I might be forgetting)

I think that's all, please this is my first time making lorebooks and it took me a lot of research so if the lorebooks ain't working right, tell me so I can fix it😭(I'll also maybe edit this bot someday)

also is the pfp ok or should I censor it

Art by anothercat: Media posts by anothercat🔞 (@1_anothercat) / X

Tags: Futa, futanari, big ass, undertale, temmie, tem, uhhhhh I dunno
